# ChatParser

> A private and seamless way to view WhatsApp chat exports.

ChatParser is a free, 100% private, browser-based tool for parsing and viewing WhatsApp chat exports (TXT or ZIP).

## Core Philosophy
We transform raw WhatsApp exports into a premium, interactive experience that feels like the original app. 

IMPORTANT (Zero-Server Architecture): ChatParser operates entirely locally. Your chat data never leaves your device. All parsing, media rendering, and database storage (IndexedDB) occur within your browser's memory. No chat data is ever uploaded to any external server.

## Features
- 100% Private: Local-first architecture ensures complete data privacy.
- High Performance: Handles 500k+ messages with 60FPS virtual scrolling.
- Full Media Support: Native playback for images, videos, audio, and documents.
- Smart Search: Filter by date, message type, or instant text search.
- PWA Ready: Installable on phone or desktop, with Share Target API integration (send chat exports directly to the app).
- Offline Capable: Works entirely offline once loaded.

## How It Works
1. Export: Open any chat in WhatsApp → Menu → More → Export Chat.
2. Include Media: Choose "Include Media" to generate a ZIP file (recommended).
3. Upload: Drag & drop your `.zip` or `.txt` file into ChatParser.
4. Relive: Browse your memories in a beautiful, high-speed interface.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript
- Build Tool: Vite 8
- Core Libraries: IndexedDB (idb), JSZip, Virtua (for list virtualization)
- Deployment: Vercel

## Resources
- Live Application: https://chatparser.online
- Privacy Policy: https://chatparser.online/privacy
- About: https://chatparser.online/about
